categories.title: Agent Goal Hijack
categories.official_description: Attackers manipulate the agent's decision pathways or objectives so it pursues an adversary-controlled goal instead of its assigned task. Canonical instance: EchoLeak.
categories.coverage_note: Direct + indirect prompt injection, persona hijack, encoding evasion, jailbreak chains, multi-turn assembly, multilingual paraphrase.

categories.title: Tool Misuse and Exploitation
categories.official_description: Legitimate tools are used unsafely because the agent acts on ambiguous instructions or has over-privileged access. Canonical instance: Amazon Q assistant tool-misuse incident.
categories.coverage_note: Unauthorized tool calls, SSRF via tool, MCP malicious response, schema-description contradiction, consent bypass.
